query: SELECT u.id, u.fileName, u.product, u.status, u.desiredOutputVolume, COUNT(v.id) as variant_count FROM ugc_uploads u LEFT JOIN ugc_variants v ON v.uploadId = u.id GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user By5XkGQEgEMb8WB.3b48d8604568 --database iRMuHk7nYQvS4BtpbvEbBz --execute SELECT u.id, u.fileName, u.product, u.status, u.desiredOutputVolume, COUNT(v.id) as variant_count FROM ugc_uploads u LEFT JOIN ugc_variants v ON v.uploadId = u.id GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 5;
